creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 173159
Proposed patch (since 418808 revision)

I made it buildable for FreeBSD 9.x also.
The implementation for strchrnul function is available:
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base/head/lib/libc/string/strchrnul.c?revision=288004&view=markup

Also, I created a patch for libdwfl/linux-kernel-modules.c file, which required <sys/types.h> include before <fts.h>, e.g. for FreeBSD 9.3:
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base/releng/9.3/include/fts.h?revision=267654&view=markup
compared to FreeBSD 10.3:
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base/releng/10.3/include/fts.h?revision=296373&view=markup
